# Enigmatrix Research Knowledge Base — Master Index
## SME Regulatory Intelligence Platform | University of Moratuwa 2026
## Generated by Perplexity AI — Complete Research Guide

---

## How to Use These Files

This knowledge base answers every major question about AI model development,
research methodology, data collection, technology selection, and system design
for the Enigmatrix research project.

---

## File Index

| # | File | What It Covers |
|---|---|---|
| 01 | `01_AI_ML_Workflow_Complete.md` | Complete AI/ML pipeline: all 9 steps, fine-tuning vs scratch, how models learn internally, missing steps, code examples |
| 02 | `02_Research_Paper_Structure.md` | Full research paper structure, per-module documentation template (objective, inputs, outputs, algorithms, tech justification), evaluation section format |
| 03 | `03_Technology_Justification.md` | Every technology explained with what/why/benefits/limitations/when to use: Python, TF, PyTorch, HuggingFace, XLM-R, FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, LangChain, XGBoost, SHAP, scikit-learn |
| 04 | `04_Data_Management_System.md` | Full PostgreSQL schema, database-driven training workflow, FastAPI routes, deduplication logic, SME questionnaire design, minimum data requirements |
| 05 | `05_Literature_Review_Guide.md` | How to read papers, key papers per module, gap statement templates, technology justification templates, where to find papers, search terms per module |
| 06 | `06_Fine_Tuning_Guide.md` | Step-by-step fine-tuning code for XLM-R (Modules 1&4), RAG setup (Module 2), XGBoost + SHAP (Module 3), hyperparameter reference table |
| 07 | `07_System_Architecture.md` | Full ASCII architecture diagram, per-module data flow diagrams, inter-module connections, deployment setup, environment installation commands |

## Technology Stack Summary

```
Data Collection:   Scrapy, PyMuPDF, Google Forms, Facebook/Twitter APIs, Label Studio
Data Processing:   Python, Pandas, NumPy, spaCy, Google Translate API
NLP Models:        XLM-R (HuggingFace Transformers), mBERT, TF-IDF
ML Models:         XGBoost, scikit-learn, SMOTE (imbalanced-learn)
RAG Pipeline:      LangChain, FAISS, ChromaDB, Sentence Transformers
Explainability:    SHAP
Synthetic Data:    SDV, CTGAN, Faker
Evaluation:        RAGAS, Cohen's Kappa, scikit-learn metrics
Frontend:          Next.js, React, TailwindCSS
Backend:           FastAPI, SQLAlchemy
Database:          PostgreSQL, ChromaDB
Visualization:     Plotly, Seaborn, Matplotlib
```

---

| Month | Focus | Key Deliverables |
|---|---|---|
| May 2026 (NOW) | Platform Development | Web app, database schema, data entry forms |
| June 2026 | Validation | User testing, model evaluation, RAGAS scores |
| July 2026 | Write-up | Research report, thesis chapters |
| August 2026 | Submission | Demo preparation, viva rehearsal |
